rows.label: qev075101_MSG0001
rows.name: Yo! Let's do this!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_JNK0010
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev075101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for the man's name.

rows.label: qev075101_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what he is trying to do.

rows.label: qev075101_JNK0030
rows.name: Refuse

rows.label: qev075101_SEL0031
rows.name: Refuse for now.

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0002
rows.name:
My name is Gi Zang! A survivor
of the Lars' Hundred Hellions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hehe! I'm in the middle of
training! I want to fight a
strong-looking person like you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0004
rows.name:
When warriors cross paths, there's
only one thing to do! Hehe! Use
whatever weapon you like![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Eeeeeh!! Wh-Why!? Let's
do it! Come on... No?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0006
rows.name:
...I get it. If you feel like
it, talk to me again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Oh, right! First, either take down
a Vice Simius or 10 Fade Apis...!
Defeat one or the other for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0008
rows.name:
It's a warm-up before our
match! Well? Will you do it!?
I'm ready whenever you are![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0009
rows.name:
You came, you came, you came! I'm getting
fired up! Then let's go! I'll show you the
power of the proud Hundred Hellions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_JNK0040
rows.name: Calm

rows.label: qev075101_SEL0041
rows.name: Stop the man who is about to run off.

rows.label: qev075101_JNK0050
rows.name: Hot-blooded

rows.label: qev075101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Match the man's momentum and
ignite your fighting spirit.

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Hehe! You've got a composed face,
but I know perfectly well your
soul is burning brightly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0011
rows.name:
My eyes didn't deceive me. I knew
you were that kind of person![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Come on, let's go! If we stand
around here, we won't catch
up to anyone or anywhere![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0013
rows.name:
So, how about it!! Did you perfectly
defeat those native creatures?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Ohh! You took down a Vice
Simius! That's quite impressive![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0015
rows.name:
...I see! You took down the
Fade Apis! They're nimble,
so it was tough, wasn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hehe! It seems I've encountered the
greatest training partner ever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'm looking forward to this
immensely! Then, let's go...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Wait? Eh? You ask who the
guy passed out next to me is?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0020
rows.name:
He challenged me to a duel just now,
so I roughed him up a little bit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0021
rows.name:
He was weak despite his huge frame! He
went down after I landed one hit. I think
his name was Tolba Wolfen or something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_JNK0060
rows.name: Beware

rows.label: qev075101_SEL0061
rows.name:
Sense Zang's strength
and raise your guard.

rows.label: qev075101_JNK0070
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev075101_SEL0071
rows.name: Call out to the fallen person.

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Hehehe! Your atmosphere changed!
So that's your combat mode![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0023
rows.name:
I see... I'll be in trouble
if I don't go all out too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Well, I avoided his vitals
so he'll wake up soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0025
rows.name:
Heh... Even so! Worrying about
someone else right before a match...
You sure have a lot of composure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Is that just carelessness, or confidence
born from your daily training...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0027
rows.name:
...Alright! I'm going full
power from the start![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0028
rows.name:
My name is Gi Zang, the last survivor
of the Hundred Hellions! Now, I draw the
sword entrusted to me by my master![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0029
rows.name:
Matchless for a thousand! Impenetrable!
This power that supported the Lars from
the shadows... Take it head-on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0030
rows.name:
You're incredibly strong! Heh... Even
though I lost, it was a really fun match.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_JNK0080
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075101_SEL0081
rows.name: Tell Zang you had fun too.

rows.label: qev075101_JNK0090
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075101_SEL0091
rows.name: Say it wasn't enough.

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Hehe! My master also said that a true
champion always enjoys a tight spot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Watching you, I feel like I somewhat
understand the meaning of those words.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Wh... What a greedy battle
maniac! You don't see many
like you even among the Lars.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0034
rows.name: Hehe! You are a true champion![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0035
rows.name:
...Alright! This is a token
of gratitude for fighting me.
Make sure you accept it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0036
rows.name:
I swear to my master, and to Ga-Derg-sama
who approved of me going on this warrior's
journey... I will become even stronger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075101_MSG0037
rows.name: ...I won't lose next time![ST:wait ]
